parameters.query:
SELECT 
  s.name AS subreddit_name,
  s.active AS subreddit_active,
  p.id AS post_id,
  p.title AS post_title,
  p.content AS post_content,
  p.author AS post_author,
  p.url AS post_url,
  p.created_at AS post_created_at,
  c.id AS comment_id,
  c.author AS comment_author,
  c.content AS comment_content,
  c.created_at AS comment_created_at
FROM reddit_subreddits_monitored s
LEFT JOIN reddit_posts p ON p.subreddit_id = s.id AND p.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'
LEFT JOIN reddit_comments c ON c.post_id = p.id
ORDER BY s.name, p.created_at DESC, c.created_at DESC;

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=You are a helpful business scout and community manager. Summarize the following Reddit posts into a clear, structured summary highlighting key user pain points, requests for recommendations, or business opportunities. Keep it concise, engaging, and format it using Slack markdown (bold, bullet points, headers, emojis). Here are the posts:

{{ $json.text }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
=🤖 *Daily Reddit Summary Report* 🤖

{{ $('Summarize via Ollama Cloud').first().json.response }}
